series_metadata.series_description: Miscellaneous plans, specifications, change orders, contracts, proposals, etc., relating to the construction and operation of the Columbus State Office Building.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area while under construction or current bienium, plus 1 additional bienium while in operation. Retain in storage for 6 years, then destroy, provided record has been audited, and audit has been released., Paper: Wastepaper
